section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of strep throat as a child.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history is typically documented in the subjective/history section rather than in the assessment, which should focus on current diagnostic impressions and problem synthesis.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is taking lisinopril at a dose of 20 milligrams per day.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes an existing medication regimen, not a new order or change. Current medications belong in the subjective section unless framed explicitly as a treatment change.
This is a statement of current medication use, not a new prescription or change, so it should be in the subjective section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient received a covid vaccine.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is past treatment/immunization history rather than a new order or plan item, so it fits better in the subjective/history section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is hoping not to receive another covid vaccine.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is the patient's preference/subjective report about future vaccination, not an explicit management action or order, so it belongs in the subjective section.
